scripts.build:web: CARGO_TARGET_DIR=target cargo build --release -p aurora --target wasm32-unknown-unknown && wasm-bindgen --out-dir dist/pkg --out-name aurora --target web target/wasm32-unknown-unknown/release/aurora.wasm
scripts.clippy:wasm: CARGO_TARGET_DIR=target cargo clippy -p aurora --target wasm32-unknown-unknown -- -D warnings
scripts.clippy: bun run clippy:wasm && bun run clippy:vst
scripts.build:vst: CARGO_TARGET_DIR=target-vst cargo run -p xtask -- bundle aurora-vst --release
scripts.dev: bun run build:web && bun run build:controls && HOT_RELOAD=1 bun run bridge/index.ts
scripts.test: bun run test:rust && bun run test:web
